mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, gender, role, phone, email, avatar, login_fail_count, locked_until, last_login_time, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, password, real_name, gender, role, phone, email, avatar, login_fail_count, locked_until, last_login_time, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{loginFailCount}, #{lockedUntil}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET login_fail_count = #{loginFailCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET login_fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, real_name as realName FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'teacher' AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY real_name ASC
